name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, timesheet discrepancies cause inaccurate payroll, leading to client dissatisfaction. We provide automated reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inaccurate payroll due to timesheet discrepancies
